level_A_auto_merge: same real non-generic email with no name conflict
same real non-placeholder phone with no name conflict
same LinkedIn/GitHub if present with no name conflict
dedup_rules_applied.conflict_policy: create separate candidate_id candidates and mark candidate_profiles/candidates with conflict_detected_no_merge for review

recommendation.summary: Adopt the two-collection design before executing MongoDB import. The new strategy is safer than the old 66-candidate merge because it preserves all 86 successful profiles and prevents automatic merges on generic/template emails.
recommendation.next_step: After validation, update import_profiles_to_mongodb.py to write candidates and candidate_profiles with dedup_v2, then run a new dry-run report before any --execute.
